blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,552 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
